NSCameraUsageDescription: Miga uses the camera to scan barcodes, receipts and photos of your meals. Images are analyzed and then deleted.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Miga accesses your photo library so you can attach a photo of a meal, receipt or nutrition label for analysis.
NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Miga reads weight, steps and workouts from Apple Health to personalize your nutrition targets. Health data is never used for advertising.
NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Miga can write the nutrition and water intake you log to Apple Health, so all your health data lives in one place.
